summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 5 major new features added to WTFHappened app: Forgot/reset password flow, Terms & Conditions, Stripe subscription, User settings page, and Admin panel

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 400 when current password is incorrect after password reset in testing
flaky_endpoints.impact: Password validation working correctly, but interferes with sequential testing

ui_bugs.issue: Login credentials may become invalid after password reset testing

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/forgot-password - Returns success message and reset token
POST /api/auth/reset-password - Successfully resets password with valid token
POST /api/auth/reset-password - Correctly rejects invalid tokens with 400
PUT /api/auth/profile - Updates user profile successfully
PUT /api/auth/auto-renew - Toggles auto-renew setting
POST /api/auth/suspend - Suspends account successfully
GET /api/subscription/info - Returns subscription status and trial info
POST /api/subscription/checkout - Creates Stripe checkout session
POST /api/admin/login - Authenticates admin with correct credentials
POST /api/admin/login - Rejects invalid admin credentials with 401
GET /api/admin/stats - Returns dashboard statistics
GET /api/admin/users - Returns user list
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/status - Updates user status
GET /api/admin/prompts - Returns AI prompts
PUT /api/admin/prompts/{id} - Updates prompt text
GET /api/admin/topics - Returns topics list
POST /api/admin/topics - Creates new topic successfully
DELETE /api/admin/topics/{id} - Deletes topic successfully
Auth screen shows 'Forgot password?' link on login mode
Auth screen shows 'Terms & Conditions' link on register mode
Admin Login link visible on auth screen
Forgot password flow: request screen loads correctly
Forgot password flow: reset token screen appears after request
Forgot password flow: new password form fields visible
Forgot password flow: back navigation works correctly
Admin login screen loads from auth screen link
Admin panel loads successfully after correct credentials
Admin panel: Overview tab displays statistics
Admin panel: Users tab shows user management interface
Admin panel: AI Prompts tab shows prompt management
Admin panel: News Feed tab shows topic management
Admin panel: Add Topic functionality works
Admin panel: Topic creation form and submission works
Admin logout button visible and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Password reset testing affects subsequent login tests - consider using separate test users or resetting passwords back to original values in test cleanup
success_percentage: Backend: 95.2% (20/21 new feature tests passed), Frontend: 85% (17/20 key UI features working)
